'''Server support for kernels: '''
*RHEL 7.3 (3.10.0-514.el7) '''Client support for unpatched kernels: '''
*RHEL 7.3 (3.10.0-514.el7) *SLES12 SP1 (3.12.62-60.64.8) '''Recommended e2fsprogs version: '''
* v1.42.13.wc5-7 '''Interoperability Support: '''
*Clients & Servers: Latest 2.8.X == Issues fixed between 2.8.0 and 2.9.0 == '''New Features '''
*[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-3289 LU-3289]: IU Shared Secret Key authentication and encryption *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-3291 LU-3291]: IU UID/GID Mapping Feature *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-4931 LU-4931]: New feature of giving server/storage side advice of accessing file *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-7335 LU-7335]: store default filesystem layout directly on root inode *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-7846 LU-7846]: Impose subdirectory mount via nodemap *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-7990 LU-7990]: 16MB bulk IO support *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-8289 LU-8289]: add ll_decode_linkea tool '''Improvements '''
*[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-1118 LU-1118]: Push file_update_time() into .page_mkwrite *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-1595 LU-1595]: force wrap at 70 columns during git commit-msg editing *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-3434 LU-3434]: improve git commit hooks for code style checking *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-3888 LU-3888]: lfs getstripe should print FID *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-3953 LU-3953]: lustre build system improvements *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-4865 LU-4865]: osd-zfs: increase object block size dynamically as object grows *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-5505 LU-5505]: Fix some problems with current read ahead algorithm *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-5560 LU-5560]: SELinux support on the client side *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-5725 LU-5725]: Add lu_object cache site_stats for OFD *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-5783 LU-5783]: o2iblnd: investigate new memory registration mechanisms *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-5953 LU-5953]: lustre[-dkms] needs to automatically account for OFED *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-6391 LU-6391]: Option for client not to stop pinging when server suppress_pings enabled *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-6429 LU-6429]: add ability to use an external journals for all targets. *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-6527 LU-6527]: Journal commit callback optimization *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-6910 LU-6910]: Configurable values for OST reserved size *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-7060 LU-7060]: Add MGS NID substitution to ldev *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-7134 LU-7134]: Ensure ZFS hostid protection if servicenode/failover options given to mkfs.lustre *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-7156 LU-7156]: Provide size of changelogs *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-7225 LU-7225]: change ladvise wire protocol for lockahead and future usage *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-7227 LU-7227]: Add a check to t-f that dmesg doesn't have critical messages *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-7334 LU-7334]: Refactor lprocfs helpers *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-7346 LU-7346]: Reintroduce tests from SLOW list back to review process *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-7355 LU-7355]: osd_trans_start() is too noisy on tiny systems *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-7521 LU-7521]: LDLM_DEBUG() should be used without \n *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-7655 LU-7655]: To drop write data on OST to help performance benchmark *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-7689 LU-7689]: limit lu_site hash table size on clients *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-7704 LU-7704]: LOOP_CTL_GET_FREE should be checked against target kernel *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-7712 LU-7712]: migration is too noisy in case of error *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-7733 LU-7733]: ptlrpc_lprocfs_svc_req_history_show (Seq_printf) time resolution should be higher than 1 second. *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-7795 LU-7795]: least_qunit should be tunnable *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-7835 LU-7835]: Improved gerrit/checkpatch.pl integration *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-7896 LU-7896]: lu_object_limit() is called too frequently *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-7898 LU-7898]: remove unnecessary declarations from osd-zfs *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-7900 LU-7900]: lu_object_assign_fid() doesn't need to lookup FID *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-7901 LU-7901]: osd-zfs doesn't need to allocate bulks for SA updates *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-7902 LU-7902]: osd_attr_set() can be turned into a noop in some cases *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-7904 LU-7904]: osd_fid_lookup() should honor LOC_F_NEW *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-7905 LU-7905]: osd-zfs should pin OI objects *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-7906 LU-7906]: osd-zfs should not set blocksize on MDT *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-7908 LU-7908]: fake object precreation for benchmarking purpose *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-7918 LU-7918]: remove unnecessary declarations in MDD and TGT *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-7931 LU-7931]: Allow per-subtest setup/cleanup logic *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-7968 LU-7968]: "build on master taking too long *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-8055 LU-8055]: Further ldev improvements *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-8056 LU-8056]: Support for linux 4.5 kernels *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-8058 LU-8058]: Remove #if 0 sections older than 4 years *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-8068 LU-8068]: Large ZFS Dnode support *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-8102 LU-8102]: Correlate ptlrpc request with AST error *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-8157 LU-8157]: Functionnal testing for layout swaps *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-8159 LU-8159]: cache xattr in ldiskfs OSD *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-8176 LU-8176]: Add file_dentry and file_inode wrappers *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-8251 LU-8251]: sanityn test_40* - test_47* : Delete only test files *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-8339 LU-8339]: Lock improvement for kiblnd_check_sends *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-8549 LU-8549]: optimize restore_and_check_size() in sanity-hsm *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-8599 LU-8599]: Restore lshowmount utility *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-8619 LU-8619]: Lustre to build against ZFS 0.7.0 *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-8648 LU-8648]: Remove all reference to Sun Inc in our source code. *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-8655 LU-8655]: customize run_mdtest() *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-8775 LU-8775]: ZFS OST has an extra 128 byte for each IO '''Bugs '''
